feed.title: DzBoom
feed.subtitle: Ent fun channel for super muper dudes

entry.title: மோடியின் Boeing 777 Boeing 747 Air India One

link.title: மோடியின் Boeing 777 Boeing 747 Air India One

entry.content:
Air India One, the highly customised wide-bodied Boeing 777 exclusively for the Indian Prime Minister, President and the Vice-President, is set to land in Delhi by early next week boeing 777-300 air india one Boeing 777 Boeing 747
இந்தியா விரைவில் ஏர் இந்தியா ஒன் (Air India One) போயிங் 777 விமானங்களை பெறப்போகிறது. ஒரு புதிய விமானம் அடுத்த வாரம் இந்த வர உள்ளது. அதிநவீன தொழில்நுட்பங்களுடன் கூடிய இந்த விமானம் பிரதமர், ஜனாதிபதி மற்றும் துணைத் தலைவர் உள்ளிட்ட வி.வி.ஐ.பி விமானங்களுக்கு பயன்படுத்தப்படும்.
entry.summary: Air India One, the highly customised wide-bodied Boeing 777 exclusively for the Indian Prime Minister, President and the Vice-President, is set to land in Delhi by early next week boeing 777-300 air india one Boeing 777 Boeing 747 இந்தியா விரைவில் ஏர் இந்தியா ஒன் (Air India One) போயிங் 777 விமானங்களை பெறப்போகிறது. ஒரு புதிய விமானம் அடுத்த வாரம் இந்த வர உள்ளது. அதிநவீன தொழில்நுட்பங்களுடன் கூடிய இந்த விமானம் பிரதமர், ஜனாதிபதி மற்றும் துணைத் தலைவர் உள்ளிட்ட வி.வி.ஐ.பி விமானங்களுக்கு பயன்படுத்தப்படும்.

entry.title: 74 Independence Day : Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath ने Lucknow में फहराया तिरंगा वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: 74 Independence Day : Uttar Pradesh CM Yogi Adityanath ने Lucknow में फहराया तिरंगा वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
The country is celebrating the 74th anniversary of its independence. The zeal of Independence Day is high all over the country. Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath hoisted the tricolor at the main gate of the UP Legislative Assembly and wished the people of the day of independence. CM Yogi said that the country is safe under the leadership of PM Modi.
देश अपनी आजादी की 74वीं वर्षगांठ मना रहा है. देशभर में स्वतंत्रता दिवस का जोश हाई है. उत्तर प्रदेश के मुख्यमंत्री योगी आदित्यनाथ ने यूपी विधानसभा के मुख्य द्वार पर तिरंगा फहराया और प्रदेशवासियों को आजादी के दिन की शुभकामना दी. सीएम योगी ने कहा कि पीएम मोदी के नेतृत्व में देश सुरक्षित है.
#IndependenceDay #CMYogiAdityanath #UttarPradesh
entry.summary: The country is celebrating the 74th anniversary of its independence. The zeal of Independence Day is high all over the country. Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath hoisted the tricolor at the main gate of the UP Legislative Assembly and wished the people of the day of independence. CM Yogi said that the country is safe under the leadership of PM Modi. देश अपनी आजादी की 74वीं वर्षगांठ मना रहा है. देशभर में स्वतंत्रता दिवस का जोश हाई है. उत्तर प्रदेश के मुख्यमंत्री योगी आदित्यनाथ ने यूपी विधानसभा के मुख्य द्वार पर तिरंगा फहराया और प्रदेशवासियों को आजादी के दिन की शुभकामना दी. सीएम योगी ने कहा कि पीएम मोदी के नेतृत्व में देश सुरक्षित है. #IndependenceDay #CMYogiAdityanath #UttarPradesh

entry.title: ‘Golden State Killer’ Gets An Earful From Victims, Complete With Gesture

link.title: ‘Golden State Killer’ Gets An Earful From Victims, Complete With Gesture

entry.content:
In a court summary released in Sacramento County Superior Court Monday, prosecutors said the scope of Joseph DeAngelo’s crimes was ‘simply staggering.’
For a decade, DeAngelo carried out a reign of rape and murder in California that earned him the nickname ‘Golden State Killer.’
On Tuesday, victims described DeAngelo as a ‘sick monster,’ "horrible man,’ and ‘subhuman’ who stole their innocence and changed their lives.
According to Newser, some read statements on behalf of their loved ones who could not testify in person.
One adult daughter of a rape survivor gave DeAngelo the middle finger and cursed him.
Between 1975 and 1986, DeAngelo committed 13 known murders and nearly 50 rapes. A former police officer, the 74-year-old eluded capture for decades.
entry.summary: In a court summary released in Sacramento County Superior Court Monday, prosecutors said the scope of Joseph DeAngelo’s crimes was ‘simply staggering.’ For a decade, DeAngelo carried out a reign of rape and murder in California that earned him the nickname ‘Golden State Killer.’ On Tuesday, victims described DeAngelo as a ‘sick monster,’ "horrible man,’ and ‘subhuman’ who stole their innocence and changed their lives. According to Newser, some read statements on behalf of their loved ones who could not testify in person. One adult daughter of a rape survivor gave DeAngelo the middle finger and cursed him. Between 1975 and 1986, DeAngelo committed 13 known murders and nearly 50 rapes. A former police officer, the 74-year-old eluded capture for decades.

entry.title: Der Cadillac LYRIQ - Leistungs- und Technologie-Highlights

link.title: Der Cadillac LYRIQ - Leistungs- und Technologie-Highlights

entry.content:
Zu den zusätzlichen Technologien und interaktiven Highlights gehören:
Batterie- und Ladeüberwachung durch klare, auf einen Blick erfassbare Grafiken. Das System ermittelt den Energiebedarf des Fahrzeugs zu Hause und unterwegs unter Berücksichtigung der Vorlieben des Eigentümers, überwacht und prognostiziert den Energieverbrauch und macht entsprechende Ladevorschläge.
Das neue, durch Augmented Reality verbesserte Head-up-Display verwendet zwei Oberflächen: die nähere Oberfläche zeigt Geschwindigkeit, Richtung und weitere primäre Informationen an, während die dahinterliegende Oberfläche die transparenten Navigationssignale und andere wichtige Hinweise abbildet.
Die neueste Version von Super Cruise, die freihändige Fahrassistenzfunktion für den US-amerikanischen Heimmarkt, einschließlich automatisiertem Spurwechsel3
Überwachtes Fernparken mit Ultraschallsensoren, mit denen der LYRIQ selbständig in parallele oder querstehende Parkplätze einparken kann – unabhängig davon, ob sich der Fahrer innerhalb oder außerhalb des Fahrzeugs4 befindet.
entry.summary: Zu den zusätzlichen Technologien und interaktiven Highlights gehören: Batterie- und Ladeüberwachung durch klare, auf einen Blick erfassbare Grafiken. Das System ermittelt den Energiebedarf des Fahrzeugs zu Hause und unterwegs unter Berücksichtigung der Vorlieben des Eigentümers, überwacht und prognostiziert den Energieverbrauch und macht entsprechende Ladevorschläge. Das neue, durch Augmented Reality verbesserte Head-up-Display verwendet zwei Oberflächen: die nähere Oberfläche zeigt Geschwindigkeit, Richtung und weitere primäre Informationen an, während die dahinterliegende Oberfläche die transparenten Navigationssignale und andere wichtige Hinweise abbildet. Die neueste Version von Super Cruise, die freihändige Fahrassistenzfunktion für den US-amerikanischen Heimmarkt, einschließlich automatisiertem Spurwechsel3 Überwachtes Fernparken mit Ultraschallsensoren, mit denen der LYRIQ selbständig in parallele oder querstehende Parkplätze einparken kann – unabhängig davon, ob sich der Fahrer innerhalb oder außerhalb des Fahrzeugs4 befindet.

entry.title: How did reopening schools become a political issue in the US? The Bottom Line

link.title: How did reopening schools become a political issue in the US? The Bottom Line

entry.content: Trump threatens to punish schools that will not reopen for classes, but many teachers say it is not yet safe to do so.
entry.summary: Trump threatens to punish schools that will not reopen for classes, but many teachers say it is not yet safe to do so.

entry.title: Bien-être animal : les images stupéfiantes d’un élevage de canards dévoilées par L214

link.title: Bien-être animal : les images stupéfiantes d’un élevage de canards dévoilées par L214

entry.content:
L’Etat ordonne, jeudi 20 août, la fermeture du bâtiment d’élevage de canards insalubre à Lichos (Pyrénées-Atlantiques), mis en cause par l’association de défense des animaux L214. 
Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :
entry.summary: L’Etat ordonne, jeudi 20 août, la fermeture du bâtiment d’élevage de canards insalubre à Lichos (Pyrénées-Atlantiques), mis en cause par l’association de défense des animaux L214. Retrouver toutes les infos sur la vidéo sur :

entry.title: ISIS தீவிரவாதி கைது! Uttar Pradesh on alert!

link.title: ISIS தீவிரவாதி கைது! Uttar Pradesh on alert!

entry.content:
ISIS arrested in Delhi. High alert issued to Uttar Pradesh
டெல்லியில் வெள்ளிக்கிழமை இரவு ஐஎஸ் தீவிரவாதி ஒருவர் கைது செய்யப்பட்டு இருப்பதையடுத்து, உத்தரப்பிரதேச போலீசாருக்கு எச்சரிக்கை விடப்பட்டுள்ளது. கைது செய்யப்பட்டு இருக்கும் தீவிரவாதி உத்தரப்பிரதேச மாநிலம் பல்ராம்பூரைச் சேர்ந்த அபு யூசுப் என்பது தெரிய வந்துள்ளது.
entry.summary: ISIS arrested in Delhi. High alert issued to Uttar Pradesh டெல்லியில் வெள்ளிக்கிழமை இரவு ஐஎஸ் தீவிரவாதி ஒருவர் கைது செய்யப்பட்டு இருப்பதையடுத்து, உத்தரப்பிரதேச போலீசாருக்கு எச்சரிக்கை விடப்பட்டுள்ளது. கைது செய்யப்பட்டு இருக்கும் தீவிரவாதி உத்தரப்பிரதேச மாநிலம் பல்ராம்பூரைச் சேர்ந்த அபு யூசுப் என்பது தெரிய வந்துள்ளது.

entry.title: Kids Are ‘Silent Spreaders’ Of COVID-19

link.title: Kids Are ‘Silent Spreaders’ Of COVID-19

entry.content:
It is believed that children may be less likely than adults to become severely sick with COVID-19.
However, mounting evidence shows they may be major silent spreaders of the virus.
A study published this week in the Journal of Pediatrics looked at nearly 200 children.
All came to urgent care clinics or hospitals with suspected COVID-19, reports HuffPost.
Almost 50 of them tested positive but most of the children were not particularly ill.
Only about half who tested positive for had a fever, for example.
Many had no symptoms, but had been in contact with someone who had the virus.
entry.summary: It is believed that children may be less likely than adults to become severely sick with COVID-19. However, mounting evidence shows they may be major silent spreaders of the virus. A study published this week in the Journal of Pediatrics looked at nearly 200 children. All came to urgent care clinics or hospitals with suspected COVID-19, reports HuffPost. Almost 50 of them tested positive but most of the children were not particularly ill. Only about half who tested positive for had a fever, for example. Many had no symptoms, but had been in contact with someone who had the virus.

entry.title: “Sometimes tonotafil tontago tonotarlory”… a tatuagem que faz voar qualquer um!

link.title: “Sometimes tonotafil tontago tonotarlory”… a tatuagem que faz voar qualquer um!

entry.content:
O programa da SIC, “Terra Nossa”, esteve por Mirandela e um dos pontos altos do programa foi quando o apresentador, César Mourão, abordou duas meninas e ficou a saber um pouco das tatuagens que ambas tinham pelo corpo.
Atento à descrição da tatuagem de uma delas… “Sometimes tonotafil tontago tonotarlory… Não sabe inglês?”
entry.summary: O programa da SIC, “Terra Nossa”, esteve por Mirandela e um dos pontos altos do programa foi quando o apresentador, César Mourão, abordou duas meninas e ficou a saber um pouco das tatuagens que ambas tinham pelo corpo. Atento à descrição da tatuagem de uma delas… “Sometimes tonotafil tontago tonotarlory… Não sabe inglês?”

entry.title: Two Men Indicted in Killing of Run-DMC’s Jam Master Jay RS News 8 18 20

link.title: Two Men Indicted in Killing of Run-DMC’s Jam Master Jay RS News 8 18 20

entry.content: Federal prosecutors indicted two men in connection with the 2002 killing of Run-DMC’s Jam Master Jay.
entry.summary: Federal prosecutors indicted two men in connection with the 2002 killing of Run-DMC’s Jam Master Jay.

entry.title: Mushk Episode 2 Promo HUM TV Drama

link.title: Mushk Episode 2 Promo HUM TV Drama

entry.content:
Mushk, Episode 2 Promo, Official HD Video - 17 August 2020
Written by the multi-talented Imran Ashraf, Mushk is a play about love, about how can anyone hide or stay away from this notion of love, its smell, and aroma. Starring Imran Ashraf and Urwa Hocane as the leads, Mushk is by far the most anticipated drama of 2020!
Starring :
Imran Ashraf, Urwa Hocane, Qavi Khan, Moomal Sheikh, Osama Tahir, Raza Talish, Sehar Khan, Shamoon Abbasi, Mohammad Ahmed & Others
Writer: Imran Ashraf
Director: Aehsun Talish
Producer: MD Productions
#Mushk #HUMTV #ImranAshraf #UrwaHocane #QaviKhan #MoomalSheikh #Drama
entry.summary: Mushk, Episode 2 Promo, Official HD Video - 17 August 2020 Written by the multi-talented Imran Ashraf, Mushk is a play about love, about how can anyone hide or stay away from this notion of love, its smell, and aroma. Starring Imran Ashraf and Urwa Hocane as the leads, Mushk is by far the most anticipated drama of 2020! Starring : Imran Ashraf, Urwa Hocane, Qavi Khan, Moomal Sheikh, Osama Tahir, Raza Talish, Sehar Khan, Shamoon Abbasi, Mohammad Ahmed & Others Writer: Imran Ashraf Director: Aehsun Talish Producer: MD Productions #Mushk #HUMTV #ImranAshraf #UrwaHocane #QaviKhan #MoomalSheikh #Drama

entry.title: Mbappé : «Avec Neymar, le courant est passé immédiatement» - Foot - C1 - PSG

link.title: Mbappé : «Avec Neymar, le courant est passé immédiatement» - Foot - C1 - PSG

entry.content: VIDÉO FOOT - Kylian Mbappé, l’attaquant du PSG, a évoqué en conférence de presse, suite à la demi-finale gagnée face à Leipzig (3-0), sa complicité avec Neymar, sur le terrain et en dehors.
entry.summary: VIDÉO FOOT - Kylian Mbappé, l’attaquant du PSG, a évoqué en conférence de presse, suite à la demi-finale gagnée face à Leipzig (3-0), sa complicité avec Neymar, sur le terrain et en dehors.

entry.title: Covid-19 : les indicateurs « continuent de se dégrader » en France

link.title: Covid-19 : les indicateurs « continuent de se dégrader » en France

entry.content: Indicateurs qui « continuent de se dégrader », transmission du virus « qui s’accentue », « plus particulièrement » chez les jeunes : la Direction générale de la Santé sonne l’alarme autour du Covid-19 dans la torpeur du mois d’août.
entry.summary: Indicateurs qui « continuent de se dégrader », transmission du virus « qui s’accentue », « plus particulièrement » chez les jeunes : la Direction générale de la Santé sonne l’alarme autour du Covid-19 dans la torpeur du mois d’août.

entry.title: Bikhray Moti Episode 13 - 18th August 2020 ARY Digital Drama

link.title: Bikhray Moti Episode 13 - 18th August 2020 ARY Digital Drama

entry.content:
Watch Bikhray Moti Episode 14 - Teaser Here:
Subscribe:
For Mobile App:
‘Bikhray Moti’ is the story of a young girl, Aiza who has dreams of making a better future for herself. But fate has something else in store for her, a promise to her dying sister takes her on a completely different path, and her mission becomes saving the lives of her nephews and niece from their heartless father, Zulfi and the evils of the society.
Written By: Edison Idrees
Directed By: Shahid Shafaat
Cast:
Yasir Nawaz
Neelam Muneer
Wahaj Ali
Nausheen Shah
Samina Ahmed
Waseem Abbas
Shaista Jabeen
Rashid Farooqui
Faiza Gillani
Saleem Mairaj
Mukhtar Shehzad
Fareeda Shabir
Tasneem Ansari
Damisha Wali
Anas Yaseen
Hazik Wali
#YasirNawaz #NeelamMuneer #BikhrayMoti
Watch Bikhray Moti Every Tuesday at 8:00 PM, only on ARY Digital.
entry.summary: Watch Bikhray Moti Episode 14 - Teaser Here: Subscribe: For Mobile App: ‘Bikhray Moti’ is the story of a young girl, Aiza who has dreams of making a better future for herself. But fate has something else in store for her, a promise to her dying sister takes her on a completely different path, and her mission becomes saving the lives of her nephews and niece from their heartless father, Zulfi and the evils of the society. Written By: Edison Idrees Directed By: Shahid Shafaat Cast: Yasir Nawaz Neelam Muneer Wahaj Ali Nausheen Shah Samina Ahmed Waseem Abbas Shaista Jabeen Rashid Farooqui Faiza Gillani Saleem Mairaj Mukhtar Shehzad Fareeda Shabir Tasneem Ansari Damisha Wali Anas Yaseen Hazik Wali #YasirNawaz #NeelamMuneer #BikhrayMoti Watch Bikhray Moti Every Tuesday at 8:00 PM, only on ARY Digital.

entry.title: Success story of Mahendra Singh Dhoni

link.title: Success story of Mahendra Singh Dhoni

entry.content:
The country was celebrating the anniversary of independence that Mahendra Singh Dhoni said goodbye to international cricket. Mahendra Singh Dhoni played 4 ODIs and 6 T-20 World Cup cricket for India. Played 200 ODIs, then 90 Test matches. In 2007, Dhoni won the T-20 World Cup and in 2011 India won the World Cup. He is the only captain in the world to have won 3 ICC Trophies.
#MSDhoni #MahendraSinghDhoni
entry.summary: The country was celebrating the anniversary of independence that Mahendra Singh Dhoni said goodbye to international cricket. Mahendra Singh Dhoni played 4 ODIs and 6 T-20 World Cup cricket for India. Played 200 ODIs, then 90 Test matches. In 2007, Dhoni won the T-20 World Cup and in 2011 India won the World Cup. He is the only captain in the world to have won 3 ICC Trophies. #MSDhoni #MahendraSinghDhoni

entry.title: Sushant Rajput Case : Mumbai Police से मिली CBI Team,लिए सभी दस्तावेज वनइंडिया हिंदी

link.title: Sushant Rajput Case : Mumbai Police से मिली CBI Team,लिए सभी दस्तावेज वनइंडिया हिंदी

entry.content:
How did Bollywood actor Sushant Singh Rajput die? The CBI team trying to find the answer to this question is in action mode as soon as they reach Mumbai. On Friday morning, the CBI team recorded the statement of Sushant’s cook Neeraj … while also meeting DCP Abhishek Trimukhe … CBI is working in Mumbai by making 2 teams. A team reached Bandra police station and took case diary and documents from the police.
बॉलीवुड एक्टर सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की मौत कैसे हुई? इस सवाल का जवाब तलाशने में जुटी CBI की टीम मुंबई पहुंचते ही ऐक्‍शन मोड में है। शुक्रवार सुबह सीबीआई की टीम ने सुशांत के कुक नीरज का बयान दर्ज किया… वहीं डीसीपी अभिषेक त्रिमुखे से भी मुलाकात की..। सीबीआई मुंबई में 2 टीम बनाकर काम कर रही है। एक टीम ने बांद्रा पुलिस थाने पहुंचकर पुलिस से केस डायरी और दस्‍तावेज ले लिए हैं।
#SushantSinghRajput #CBI
entry.summary: How did Bollywood actor Sushant Singh Rajput die? The CBI team trying to find the answer to this question is in action mode as soon as they reach Mumbai. On Friday morning, the CBI team recorded the statement of Sushant’s cook Neeraj … while also meeting DCP Abhishek Trimukhe … CBI is working in Mumbai by making 2 teams. A team reached Bandra police station and took case diary and documents from the police. बॉलीवुड एक्टर सुशांत सिंह राजपूत की मौत कैसे हुई? इस सवाल का जवाब तलाशने में जुटी CBI की टीम मुंबई पहुंचते ही ऐक्‍शन मोड में है। शुक्रवार सुबह सीबीआई की टीम ने सुशांत के कुक नीरज का बयान दर्ज किया… वहीं डीसीपी अभिषेक त्रिमुखे से भी मुलाकात की..। सीबीआई मुंबई में 2 टीम बनाकर काम कर रही है। एक टीम ने बांद्रा पुलिस थाने पहुंचकर पुलिस से केस डायरी और दस्‍तावेज ले लिए हैं। #SushantSinghRajput #CBI
